_comment: Priority Feishu chat_ids to ingest, polled in addition to whatever `im +chat-list --as user` enumerates. Profile = 'business-morty' (corporate bot). lark-cli's chat-list only returns chats the bot/user can enumerate; for any work group not listed, add its oc_... chat_id here so it's always polled.
_how_to_find_chat_id: lark-cli --profile business-morty im +chat-list --as user  (shows groups the corporate bot can see). Or im +chat-search --query <name>. The bot must be a member of a group to read its messages.
_retired: 2026-05-27 removed personal 'morty' p2p placeholder (oc_3f79e597...) — personal bot retired in favor of corporate 'business-morty'.

chats.name: {{PROJECT_A}} x 抖音 试玩会专项
